description: Allow/deny policy for API-key wiring. Consumed by .claude/hooks/no-paid-api-key.sh. Default is DENY for any *_API_KEY pattern not explicitly allowlisted. Edit this file to add new keys; do not silently bypass.

denylist.reason: Claude Code subscription is the only billing path. Setting or propagating this routes through the metered Anthropic API instead of the subscription. Spec authority: meta/harness/docs/specs/agent-heavy-run-prompt-schema.md (hard_rules.environment), agent-heavy-run-prompt-index.md (Policy Summary).
Not allowlisted for this repo. CWICR Qdrant cost search and adjacent embedding workflows explicitly disallow OPENAI_API_KEY wiring (see meta/harness/docs/specs/* disallowed_paths).

allowlist.reason: InfraNodus is the registered comparison engine for the FRE wrapper. Authority: analysis/capabilities/infranodus-capability-registry.yaml, analysis/infranodus/infranodus-capability-manifest.yaml, .claude/rules/infranodus-corpus.md.
browser-harness uses Browser Use cloud API for remote daemon sessions. Authority: ~/browser-harness/SKILL.md.

_notes: bash_set       — block Bash commands that set/export/inline-assign this var
bash_propagate — when invoking a tool listed in must_strip_when_invoking, require env -u of this var
file_persist   — block Write/Edit/MultiEdit that would persist KEY=<real-value> to a tracked file outside file_write_safe_paths
2. Add an entry with id, reason, enforce_on.
3. Run bash .claude/hooks/_test-no-paid-api-key.sh — add at least one positive and one negative fixture for the new key.
